name: fcm-notification-lambda
description: AWS Lambda function for FCM push notifications via API Gateway

scripts.package: pnpm run build && pnpm install --prod --node-linker=hoisted && zip -r lambda.zip dist/ node_modules/ && pnpm install
scripts.deploy: pnpm run package && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name $LAMBDA_FUNCTION_NAME --zip-file fileb://lambda.zip --region $AWS_REGION
